_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: Reporting period 2035: 65% CO₂ reduction target for all sub-groups including vocational vehicles; 100% zero-emission mandate for urban buses.
prior.source_span: (c) 65 % for all vehicle sub-groups for the reporting periods of the years 2035 to 2039
